title: ANGLES/ENGELS/ENGIROSI
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: ANGLES/ENGELS/ENGIROSI (Angels)

verses.text: 9.ANGLES/ENGELS/ENGIROSI 10/01/26 CHIONA KA
Ndo IZWI raro
Asi haridi ma speaker kuti urinzwe
Rikatongo buda watonzwa kuti ndo rati CHIONA KA
Zvino pane nyaya yangu yekuti murare muchi zeya mupfungwa nde apa:
Kana Mwari ari mumwe chete , zvafanana ne munhu mumwe chete
Anogona kuku udza nhau imwe chete ne ma ANGLES aka siyana
Kusanduka kwe ANGLE sandi kusanduka kwe ataura
Zvino ku SHONA hakuna vara rekuti NGIROZI ramuri kudada naro
Muchiti NHAU dza ABASID hakuna NGIROZI yakadzi taura wani
Vara rekuti NGIROZI hamuzive kwarakabva
Rakabva pa vara re ENGLISH rekuti ANGELS
Asi ka ku ENGLISH kwacho harina kuvambira ipapo
Vara rekuti ANGELS racho pakutanga kwaiva kusina
Kana Jesu zva akafamba , hakuna munhu aimboti kune ma ANGELS
Vaiti ma ANGLES a MWARI
Mirai henyu
Musa mhanye
Kare VAITO ma ANGLES auya na MWARI
Akazo sandura kubva ku ANGLES achiti ngatichiti ANGELS ndi POPE we ROMA musi uno. Achiti
"Non Angli, sed angeli"
Zvichireva kuti
Not Angles, but angels
Chionai kuyera kwa BABA JOHANI
Zuva rino penya na 6am Pamuno namata , ndo zuva rino penya na 9am pamuno namata
Asi mupisiro wakasiyana
Chinoita kuti mupisiro we zuva na 6am usiyane ne mupisiro we zuva rimwe chete na 9am inyaya ye ANGLE yarava
Saka ANGLE ya 6am haizo fanana ne ANGLE ya 9am
ANGLE ya 6am toiti ABRAHAM
Ya 9am toiti GABRIEL
Zuva rrimwe CHETE sa MWARI mumwe chete
Asi mupisiro wa ABRAHAM, wakasiyana ne mupisiro wa GABRIEL
Ndo kuti NGIROZI kana kuti ENGIROZI kana kuti ANGLES
Saka chiri kuita kuti murambe muri pasi peva ENGLISH nde ichi
Ivo nyangwe va drawer NGIROZI ine mapapiro , havasi kuti mukoma ava variko kudenga
Vari kuti ayewa ANGORI mauiro anoita MWARI ne ANGLE iyoyo
Se zvamunoita muchitaura paya, unonzwa munhu achiti
Haaaa but ANGLE yawazouya nayo nhasi yakapenga
ANGLE zvinotaura MAONERO
Mumwe anogona kuti kwauri ,
Iwe uri kuona ne ANGLE ipi
Iwe wotaura ANGLE yauri kuona nayo
Zvino isu takafunga kuti Ma ANGLE anouya na MWARI zvinhu zvinenge vanhu zviri kudenga
Vachena vakati hativaudze
"Non Angli, sed angeli"
(Not Angles, but angels),
Pope Gregory akati ngatibvise zita rekuti Angles Timati ma ANGELS
Asi BABA JOHANI vakati Chengetai nguva dza kati ne dzakati, muchasangana ne NGIROZI
Regai ndiku ratidzei
Saka pa am , zuva rinenge rakaita 45°
Saka kana MWARI achiuya ne ANGLE ye 45°, anosvikoti ndini GABRIEL
Akauyawo ne 90°, inova right ANGLE , anoti ndini EMANUEL
Asi ndi MWARI MUMWE chete
Chinopa kuti JESU azonzi ano pisa kudarika ma ANGLES oae, inhau yekuti ndiye 12 oclock masikati
Zuva rinenge rasvika pa MAXIMUM
Rotanga kuderera futi
Saka ZUVA ra 9am ndiro zuva rimwe chete na 12 masikati
Asi mupisiro wasiyana
NGIROZI dzose dze Idi dzamakanzwa angori MWARI mumwe chete
Kana manzwisisa ipapo, ZUVA rinofara
Saka hakuna NGIROZI dzamuno funga, kungori na MWARI mumwe chete ari kuuya ne ma ANGLES Akasiyana siyana
MWARI MUMWE CHETE SE ZUVA
Izvi vanga vasingafe vazviziva
Ndosaka ndakati , munondiramba zvenyu asi.....
Ndatenda, tosangana mangwanani 🫶☀️🙏🏻 AMEN 🙏🏻☀️ …..
CONTINUED 👇👇
